description_long: This object is a large, upright, rectangular waste bin with a slightly tapered body, wider at the top and narrowing towards the base. The main body is a muted olive green color, constructed from what appears to be durable plastic, and it is topped with a flat, black lid that covers the entire opening. The lid is slightly overhanging, providing protection from rain and pests, and is likely hinged at the rear for easy opening. At the base, two robust black wheels are attached on either side, allowing the bin to be easily tilted and rolled for transport. The surface of the bin is smooth and unmarked, with no visible handles or reinforcement bands, giving it a clean, utilitarian appearance. This type of bin is commonly found on sidewalks, in residential neighborhoods, or near garages for waste collection.
description: A large, olive green wheeled waste bin with a flat black lid and smooth, unmarked surfaces. It features two black wheels for mobility and is typically used for outdoor waste collection.
description_view_0: Side view showing the sloped black lid, olive green body, and one large black wheel at the base.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full width of the bin, both wheels visible, and the flat black lid covering the top.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with the sloped lid and a single wheel visible at the base.
description_view_3: Top-down view highlighting the flat, square black lid and the rectangular shape of the bin's opening.
